Ntc And Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Yellow Cab's Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination is granted. The court finds that Plaintiff's failure to appear for the IME was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $460, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc And Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Continued To Nov-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 612
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Defendant Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc.'s motion to compel independent medical examination is continued to Nov-13-2007 at 9:00 AM at the request of the moving party. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
